arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues major injury update on key defenders ahead of Arsenal clash vs West Ham
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says Ben White’s knee surgery 'went really well' - but the club are still being very cautious regarding his rehabilitation. Asked about White’s surgery on Friday, ahead of Arsenal's trip to West Ham United on Saturday, Arteta said: “Still early days - the surgery went really well; there is no reaction after that.

arts.sum: Arsenal make the short trip across the capital to face West Ham United at the London Stadium this weekend. Mikel Arteta admitted during Friday’s pre-match press conference that confidence is back in his squad, following impressive wins over Nottingham Forest and Sporting Lisbon. arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher shares brutal truth on Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham as U-turn prediction made
arts.sum: "I know there is still a long way to go, but, not just for Liverpool, I actually think Arsenal might finish above Manchester City, even though Manchester City I think are just above them at the moment, but I just think the problems that they've got in midfield, that would be one I think I would change." He said on Sky Sports: "[I picked] Manchester City [to win the league]; it looks like this prediction may come a cropper, which I would be quite pleased about if I'm totally honest.
